title: Lacrosse Practice
notes: Final Monday lacrosse practice. Counts as a hard multidirectional running day.
recoveryRule: Hydrate, eat normally, and adjust off-ice work if legs are heavy.
doNotDoRule: No extra hard conditioning after lacrosse practice.
trackingQuestions: How hard did it feel from 1-5?

title: Lacrosse Game
notes: Final Wednesday lacrosse game. Counts as the day's hard competitive load.
recoveryRule: Hydrate, eat normally, and use Thursday for recovery if needed.
doNotDoRule: No extra hard dryland or conditioning after the game.
trackingQuestions: How hard did it feel from 1-5?

title: Knights U13 Lacrosse Playoff Game
notes: High-intensity playoff external load. Planned duration is 60-90 minutes; confirm exact time.
recoveryRule: Recovery snack, fluids, mobility, and early bed.
doNotDoRule: No hard dryland, fatigue shooting, or KPI testing after playoff game.
trackingQuestions: Any soreness, contact load, or pain?

title: Knights U13 Lacrosse Playoff Game

doNotDoRule: No hard dryland, fatigue shooting, or KPI testing after playoff game.

title: Chase Hull Camp
notes: Camp day with approximately 2 hours of ice.
recoveryRule: Camp replaces hard dryland. Prioritize food, hydration, and sleep.
doNotDoRule: No hard dryland or conditioning.

doNotDoRule: No hard dryland or make-up session.

title: Powerskating & Pucks
